subcodes.first_line: Thou wert enraptured aforetime with the mention of God, exalted be His glory, and now this My Most Truthful Name, upon both of whom rest My splendor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از قبل بذکر حق  جله  جلاله فائز گشتی و حال ابن اسمی اصدق علیهما بهائی و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
